title: Fixation of marine samples for flow cytometry sorting
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4bhhq","text":"Protocol to fix marine samples for flow cytometry sorting of phytoplankton. steps: Prefilter seawater sample onto 200 µm mesh undetermined
Add 1.5 mL of prefiltered seawater sample to a 2 mL cryotube
Add DMSO undetermined DMSO Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #472301
Add Pluronic (facultative) undetermined Pluronic 10% Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P5556-100mL
Flash freeze in liquid nitrogen tank
creator: Daniel Vaulot
